title: Expert Witness Fees Calculator | Psychology Direct
description: Estimate your expert witness costs in 60 seconds. Compare Legal Aid and private funding rates for psychologists and psychiatrists.
keywords: how much does an expert report cost

blocks.headline: Know Your Expert Witness Costs Upfront
blocks.subtitle: Get an instant estimate for psychological or psychiatric expert witness reports. Legal Aid rates, private funding, fast-track options — all transparent. No hidden fees.

blocks.heading: Why Costs Vary (And What You're Paying For)

rows.col1: Detailed assessment, comprehensive report, full QA review
rows.col2: Most common option for non-urgent cases

rows.col1: Expedited processing, priority scheduling, same quality
rows.col2: Higher cost due to rescheduling and prioritisation

rows.col1: Additional expertise, niche specialism, longer assessment
rows.col2: Requires more expert time and specialist knowledge

rows.col1: Fixed hourly fees set by LAA, same quality delivery
rows.col2: Rates are standardised across all providers

blocks.heading: Typical Expert Witness Costs at a Glance

faqs.question: What's included in the fee?
faqs.answer: Our expert witness fees cover the full assessment and comprehensive report writing, 100% quality assurance and proofreading, administrative coordination, and client management. You receive a breakdown showing hours spent on each component, as required by the Legal Aid Agency. There are no hidden fees or surprise charges.

faqs.question: Why do fast-track reports cost more?
faqs.answer: Fast-track reports require prioritised scheduling. Our Client Managers often coordinate tightly around court deadlines. The expert may need to rearrange their schedule. The quality remains the same — only the timeline is accelerated.

faqs.question: Do you offer discounts for multi-party assessments?
faqs.answer: Yes. Assessing multiple individuals in the same case is more efficient due to shared background review and coordinated logistics. We can often negotiate volume discounts. Provide us with your case details for a tailored quote.

faqs.question: Is Legal Aid funding always cheaper than private?
faqs.answer: Legal Aid rates are set by the LAA and are fixed for all providers. Private rates vary by expert and complexity. In many cases, instructing through us at Legal Aid rates is equal to or cheaper than sourcing experts directly, because of our efficiency and no markup.

faqs.question: Can I get a detailed breakdown before committing?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Every quote we provide includes a full line-by-line breakdown of hours, daily rates, and services. You'll see exactly what you're paying for. Use our calculator above or call 01306 879 975 to discuss your specific case.

faqs.question: What if my case doesn't fit the standard pricing?
faqs.answer: Many complex cases require custom quotes. Call us on 01306 879 975 or submit your brief using the calculator. We'll review and provide a bespoke estimate that reflects the real requirements of your case.

faqs.question: Do you accept Legal Aid funding?
faqs.answer: Yes. All our psychologists and psychiatrists work at Legal Aid Agency rates. We provide CVs and quotes formatted exactly as the LAA requires. We're fully compliant with Legal Aid fee schedules and payment processes.

faqs.question: How does quality vary across price points?
faqs.answer: It doesn't. Whether you're instructing at Legal Aid rates or private rates, you receive the same HCPC/GMC-registered expert, the same assessment depth, and the same 100% quality assurance. Price reflects timeline and case complexity, not expert calibre.

blocks.heading: Still Unsure About Costs?
blocks.bodyText: Every case is different. Our Client Managers can discuss your specific requirements. We'll provide a binding quote within 24 hours. No obligation, no surprises.

blocks.heading: What Clients Say About Our Pricing

testimonials.quote: Transparent pricing and no hidden fees. They gave me a breakdown of exactly what we were paying for. Refreshing.
We switched from instructing experts directly because Psychology Direct's quotes were clearer and often cheaper due to their efficiency.
The calculator gave us a ballpark within seconds. Then their team provided a detailed quote. No surprises, no pressure.

blocks.text: Using Legal Aid funding? We provide fee breakdowns in the exact format the LAA requires. No additional admin burden on your side.
